Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Effect of building direction on the microstructure and tensile properties of Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb alloy additively manufactured by electron beam melting

Composition_Info.Note: Al loss of approximately 2 at% due to evaporation during EBM process; measured values from specimen at θ=0°

Process_Text.original: Electron beam melting using Arcam A2X system (Arcam AB, Mölndal, Sweden); operating voltage 60 kV; electron beam scanned in zigzag pattern with 90° rotation between layers; layer thickness 90 μm; pre-heating temperature 1060°C before melting each powder layer; building angle θ=0° (building direction parallel to cylindrical axis)
Process_Text.simplified: EBM (Arcam A2X, 60 kV, 90 μm layer, 1060°C pre-heat, zigzag scan, 90° rotation between layers, θ=0°)

Key_Params.Scanning_Pattern: zigzag with 90 deg rotation between layers

Microstructure_Text.original: Unique layered microstructure composed of alternating duplex-like regions (~60 μm thick) and γ band regions (~30 μm thick). Duplex-like region: fine lamellar γ/α2 grains and fine equiaxed γ grains. γ band region: coarser equiaxed γ phase grains arranged perpendicular to building direction. Layer thickness sum corresponds approximately to powder layer thickness (90 μm). Lamellar structure with γ lamellae 162 nm and α2 lamellae 48 nm average thickness.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Layered microstructure: duplex-like fine grains (~60 μm) alternating with coarser γ bands (~30 μm); γ lamellae 162 nm, α2 lamellae 48 nm; perpendicular to build direction

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at ~25°C (room temperature); strain rate 1.67×10^-4 s^-1; vacuum
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge length 5 mm, cross-section ~0.8×1.5 mm; electro-discharge machined from center of EBM bars
Properties_Info.Note: Highest yield strength among tested orientations at room temperature; higher than cast alloys due to finer microstructure
Over 350 MPa at 800°C; comparable to conventionally processed alloys
Over 40% elongation at 800°C; similar to conventionally processed Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb alloys

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Approximate transition temperature; elongation significantly increases above this
Properties_Info.Note: Approximately 750°C; slightly lower than previous EBM study
